text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! Your moderator application has been approved. We're excited to have you help us keep the community friendly and supportive. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Welcome @guide_sam! Your event helper application has been approved. We can't wait to see the awesome events you'll help organize for the community. Let us know if you need any getting started resources.

Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! Your membership application has been approved. We're so glad you're here! Feel free to introduce yourself in the #introductions channel and check out our community guidelines to get started.

Welcome @mentor_lina! Your mentor application has been approved. We're incredibly grateful to have you share your knowledge and experience with our community members. The mentorship program team will reach out shortly with next steps.
